claim: For a 1009x2039 fp32 matrix transpose on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, shared-memory tiled transpose measured 7.738806x faster than the naive strided-write baseline using HIP-event timing only, while exercising non-square tail tiles.
expected_profiler_signals: lower shared-memory bank conflict rate from padded tile
curation_note: timing-only awkward-shape sweep: HIP-event timings and correctness passed for non-square tail tiles, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected. Treat bank-conflict and transaction notes as expected signals until counter-backed evidence is attached.
